column8: port Screen_QuickRaceMenu refactored to use frontend_create_button/play_sfx helpers; orig DDraw blits (BltColorFillToSurface, QueueFrontendOverlayRect, MoveFrontendSpriteRect) replaced; same 7-state FSM and button geometry preserved

port td5_save_apply_cup_unlocks_ex dispatches on game_type 1-6 unlocking multiple cars/tracks; orig dispatches on g_selectedScheduleIndex (cases 4,5,6,7,16,17,18) unlocking single car index per call; structurally reorganized to match port's unified cup-end flow

port frontend_render_race_results_overlay uses fe_draw_text instead of orig DDraw per-glyph DrawFrontendLocalizedStringToSurface; same panel geometry (152,81)/(408,392), label column anchors (x=0, x=0x118), row stride 0x18, per-game-type Y offsets (0x30/0x48/0x60) preserved

port Screen_RaceResults faithfully mirrors 0x16 state FSM (init/present/slide-in/interact/slide L+R/exit/post-race buttons/save-cup); extensive CONFIRMED@ citations; DDraw blits replaced with frontend_* helpers; semantically equivalent

port Screen_CupFailed faithful — same gate (game_type 1-6 else MAIN_MENU), dialog 0x198x0x70, OK button at -0x120, 6-state FSM (init/3xpresent/slide-in 0x20/wait); state 5 hardcodes TD5_SCREEN_MAIN_MENU vs orig g_returnToScreenIndex (callers always set 5)
